_comment: meta-check configuration — per-rule overrides and allowlists

orphan_allowlist._comment: GUID-02 suppressions — objects not referenced by any room but legitimately orphaned
orphan_allowlist.matchbox-open: mutation-target: matchbox mutates to matchbox-open when opened
orphan_allowlist.glass-shard: mutation-target: glass objects mutate to glass-shard when broken
orphan_allowlist.ceramic-shard: mutation-target: ceramic objects mutate to ceramic-shard when broken
orphan_allowlist.locked-door: portal-variant: generic door template used by portal system
orphan_allowlist.wooden-door: portal-variant: generic door template used by portal system
orphan_allowlist.trap-door: portal-variant: generic trapdoor template used by portal system
orphan_allowlist.unstable-ceiling: future-content: environmental hazard for Level 2+ rooms
orphan_allowlist.bandage: future-content: healing item, needs crafting system or room placement
orphan_allowlist.salve: future-content: healing item, needs room placement
orphan_allowlist.healing-poultice: future-content: healing item, needs crafting system or room placement
orphan_allowlist.nightshade-antidote: future-content: healing item, needs crafting system or room placement
orphan_allowlist.cloth: future-content: crafting material, needs room placement
orphan_allowlist.rag: future-content: crafting material, needs room placement
orphan_allowlist.altar-candle: future-content: crypt room object, needs room placement
orphan_allowlist.incense-stick: future-content: crypt/chapel object, needs room placement
orphan_allowlist.burial-jewelry: future-content: crypt room object, needs room placement
orphan_allowlist.chest: future-content: container, needs room placement in Level 2+
orphan_allowlist.skull: future-content: crypt room object, needs room placement
orphan_allowlist.stone-alcove: future-content: architectural element, needs room placement
orphan_allowlist.wall-clock: future-content: furniture, needs room placement in hallway or study
